tasks.reason: The user explicitly requested an upgrade to .NET 10. .NET 10 is the current latest LTS release, offering long-term support, enhanced performance, and access to the latest platform features and security improvements beyond what .NET 8 provides.
tasks.requirements: Upgrade all 10 projects in the eShopOnWeb solution from net8.0 to net10.0. This includes updating the central TargetFramework property in Directory.Packages.props, updating global.json to SDK 10.0.x, upgrading all NuGet package references (ASP.NET Core 8.x → 10.x, Entity Framework Core 8.x → 10.x, Microsoft.Extensions.* 8.x → 10.x, and other version-pinned packages), and resolving any breaking API changes introduced between .NET 8 and .NET 10.
